testcase.name: test_upload_text_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5.py:381: in test_upload_text_file assert r.status_code == 200, f"Upload text file failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Upload text file failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_global_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5.py:398: in test_upload_global_file assert r.status_code == 200, f"Upload global file failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Upload global file failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_knowledge_search

failure.message: AssertionError: Knowledge search failed: 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_simulate_no_agents_returns_200

failure.message: AssertionError: Simulate returned 500: Internal Server Error CRITICAL: If 500, orchestrator still uses sync Anthropic client or other async issue. assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: CRITICAL BUG: Simulate returned 500 even with AsyncAnthropic fix! Internal Server Error assert 500 != 500 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
